target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Tank is stationary but intact; no visible holes, scorching, or missing components; crew present and unharmed; no signs of catastrophic failure or unrepairable damage.

summary: One military equipment target assessed: 1 tank with NO DAMAGE confirmed.
